# 🧠 VS Code + Copilot Cheat Sheet

## 🚀 Core Workflow
| Action | Shortcut | Description |
|---|---|---|
| Run dev server | **⌘⇧B** | Runs `npm run dev` (Vite) |
| Debug in Chrome | **F5** | Launches Chrome + Vite |
| Command Palette | **⌘⇧P** | Search any command |
| Toggle Terminal | **⌃`** | Show/hide terminal |

## 🤖 Copilot Inline (Ghost Text)
| Action | Shortcut | Description |
|---|---|---|
| Accept suggestion | **Tab** | Accept full line |
| Accept word | **⌘→** | Accept next word |
| Next/Prev suggestion | **⌥] / ⌥[** | Cycle options |
| Dismiss | **Esc** | Clear ghost text |
| Re‑trigger | **⌘I** | Ask Copilot again |

> If ghost text doesn’t show, ensure **Copilot: Active** (status bar).

## 💬 Copilot Chat (Sidebar)
| Action | Shortcut | Description |
|---|---|---|
| Open Chat | **⌘⇧I** or sidebar icon | Chat with your codebase |
| Explain selection | Select → `/explain` | Understand logic |
| Fix selection | Select → `/fix` | Auto-suggest improvements |
| Generate code | `/code` or `/generate` | Create snippets |
| Add context | `@file`, `#symbol` | Ground responses |

## 🧰 Formatting & Style
| Action | Shortcut | Description |
|---|---|---|
| Format | **⌥⇧F** | Prettier |
| Auto-fix on save | **⌘S** | ESLint + Prettier |
| Toggle comment | **⌘/** | Line comment |

## 🎨 Tailwind + React
| Action | Shortcut | Description |
|---|---|---|
| Tailwind preview | Hover class | See CSS output |
| React snippet | `rfc` | New component (ES7+) |
| Color preview | Hover color class | Swatch popup |

## ⚙️ Quick Maintenance
- **Reload Window**: fixes most VS Code weirdness.
- **Copilot: Restart Agent**: resets Copilot.
- **Extensions: Show Recommended**: ensure workspace setup.

**Place this file at**: `.vscode/Copilot-Shortcuts.md`
